title: EQ - Button to change preset is present
scenario: EQ settings screen displays a preset change button below the headline with default preset set to Bass
steps: Check the headline on the screen.
Look for a button below the headline to change the preset.
Verify the default preset displayed is 'Bass'.
Tap the button to view available presets.
Confirm the list includes: Bass, Flat, Bright, and Custom EQ.
expected: The EQ settings screen displays a button below the headline to change the preset. The default preset is Bass. Available presets are: Bass, Flat, Bright, and Custom EQ.
